name: Read files before editing them
action: Always Read target file before Edit/Write

name: Verify before committing code
action: Run vitest/tsc before git commit or push

name: Explore multiple files before taking action
action: Read 3+ related files to build context before running commands or editing

name: Search before writing new code
action: Use Grep/Glob to find existing implementations before creating new files

name: Test after implementing changes
action: Run vitest after editing source files to catch regressions immediately

name: Check dashboard for system health
action: Run /dashboard or npx tsx scripts/dashboard.ts to verify harness state

name: Plan before implementing changes
action: Use /kplan or Agent to break complex tasks into steps before editing code

name: Read tests alongside source code
action: Read the test file for a module to understand expected behavior and edge cases

name: Commit before pushing
action: Always commit changes before pushing to remote

name: Re-run tests after fixing failures
action: When tests fail, edit code and re-run tests to confirm the fix

name: Multi-file refactor pattern
action: When editing 3+ files in sequence, consider using a structured refactor plan

name: Glob search before editing
action: Use Glob to find files by pattern before editing them

name: Build after editing TypeScript
action: Run npm run build or tsc after editing TypeScript to verify compilation
